name: CONTRACT-BUG-31
title: check-symlinks-resolve.py uses fixed maxdepth=3 missing deeper symlinks
description: scripts/enforcement/check-symlinks-resolve.py lines 51-54 hard-code max depth of 3 levels under .claude/. Symlinks at depth greater than 3 are silently skipped.

history.note: Fixed Wave 3 batch 2: schema permissiveness, template fields, enforcement script corrections per Inv 22-33.
